targets.expr: kamaji_tenant_control_plane_info * on(tcp_namespace, tcp_name) group_left(status, ready) kamaji_tenant_control_plane_status

topk(15, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (controller, le) (rate(controller_runtime_reconcile_time_seconds_bucket[5m])))) and on(controller) (sum by (controller) (rate(controller_runtime_reconcile_total[5m])) > 0.01)
